CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Continued To Jul-29-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Mtn To Approve And Enter Consent Judgmnt
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jason Gianvecchio, Esq., 310.623.1926, for plaintiff Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc.
Kimberly Chew, Esq., 510.444.6800, for defendants Thomas & Betts Corporation, Thomas & Betts International, Inc. and True Value Company.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC.'s Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment UNDER SUBMISSION. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.

Mtn To Approve And Enter Consent Judgmnt
Off Calendar Apr-25-2014 Continued To May-29-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jason Gianvecchio, Esq. of Yeroushalmi & Associates, Tel. 310.623.1926, for plaintiff and moving party;
Kimberly I. Chew, Esq. of Burnham Brown, Tel. 510.835.6729, for defendants.

RULING: The matter was discussed/argued. After hearing, the Court continued PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment to May 29, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302 for further briefing re: evidence to support approval of the settlement. The briefing schedule will be based on the new hearing date. Parties must deliver courtesy copies to Department 302 of their papers on the day of filing. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
